scripts.preinstall: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('package-lock.json',{force: true}); require('fs').rmSync('yarn.lock',{force: true}); if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent.includes('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); } "
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
